evidence: standards/enterprise/data-lifecycle.md and the final joined AI consistency review
exception_policy: No exception permits silent destructive fallback; an emergency forward-recovery decision records exact affected versions, integrity risk, owner, user impact, and remediation path.
statement: Every persisted-data schema change MUST be versioned, deterministic, restart-safe, integrity-preserving, and paired with a declared rollback or forward-recovery decision before rollout.
